tools.name: report.getreportstatusbyId
tools.description: Retrieves the Subscription's report status, filtering by its reportId.

tools.name: report.requestreportbydate
tools.description: Retrieves a report with the subscriptions created at the date interval requested

tools.name: report.requestreportbyorderdate
tools.description: Retrieves a report regarding the Subscriptions created during the date interval of orders.

tools.name: report.requestreportbyschedule
tools.description: Retrieves a report regarding the Subscriptions scheduled to execute at the date interval requested

tools.name: report.requestreportbyStatus
tools.description: Retrieves Subscriptions' reports, filtering by status. The report will be sent by email, to the address inserted in the API's path.

tools.name: report.requestreportbyupdate
tools.description: Retrieves a report regarding Subscriptions updated in the date interval chosen. The report will be sent by email, to the address inserted in the API's path.

tools.name: settings.editSettings
tools.description: Edits Subscriptions settings in your store.

tools.name: settings.getSettings
tools.description: Lists the current Subscriptions settings in your store.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.additemsubscriptionGroupId
tools.description: Adds an SKU to a given Subscription, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.cancelSubscriptionbygroupId
tools.description: Cancels Subscription by `groupId`

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getaddressesbygroupId
tools.description: Lists addresses linked to a given Subscription group, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getAllsubscriptiongroup
tools.description: Retrieves all subscription groups in your store.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getConfigsubscriptionsgroup
tools.description: Retrieves details about a given subscription group's configuration, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getConversationMessagebygroupId
tools.description: Retrieves the conversation of a given Subscription group, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getfrequencyoptionsbygroupId
tools.description: Lists frequency options of a given Subscription group, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getNextpurchase
tools.description: Lists details of a given subscription group's next purchase, filtering by dateStr.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getpaymentSystembygroupId
tools.description: Retrieves payment system's information of a given Subscription group, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getSimulatebysubscriptionGroup
tools.description: Retrieves Subscription simulations, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getSubscriptionbygroupId
tools.description: Lists Subscription details, filtering by `groupId`.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getsubscriptiongrouplist
tools.description: Retrieves a list of Subscription groups in your store.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.getwillcreatebygroupId
tools.description: Retrieves Subscription groups listed as 'will create', filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.insertAddressesbygroupId
tools.description: Insert address information of a given Subscription group, filtering by groupId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.retrysubscriptionbygroupId
tools.description: Permits the retry of a Subscription group, via API, filtering by groupId and instanceId.

tools.name: subscriptionGroup.updateSubscriptionbygroupId
tools.description: Updates a Subscription by `groupId`.

tools.name: subscriptions.cancelSubscriptionsbySubscriptionId
tools.description: Cancels all Subscriptions of a subscription group. This operation does not have a rollback. Once cancelled, it cannot be re-activated

tools.name: subscriptions.getfrequencyoptionsbysubscriptionId
tools.description: Lists frequency options for the Subscription, filtering by `subscriptionId`.

tools.name: subscriptions.getsubscriptionbyId
tools.description: Lists Subscription's details, searching by `subscriptionId`.

tools.name: subscriptions.getSubscriptionList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of Subscriptions linked to your store.

tools.name: subscriptions.getsubscriptionstocustomer
tools.description: Retrieves details of a given customer's subscriptions, searching by that customer's `customerId`.

tools.name: subscriptions.insertAddressesforSubscription
tools.description: Inserts address's information to complement the Subscription details.

tools.name: subscriptions.updateSubscriptionsbySubscriptionId
tools.description: Update, add or alter information of a given Subscription, filtering by `subscriptionId`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
